title: Lilith and the lance of longinus questions
display_title: Lilith and the lance of longinus questions
wikitext:
[]: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Thu Dec 31, 2015 12:59 pm In EP 12 Gendo and fuyutsuki recover the lance from the south pole. In the last scene of EP 14 we are made to believe that Rei uses unit 00 to place the lance in lilith. In EP 15 we see Lilith as we know her with the lance inside her chest and with no lower part. Than we see her back again in EP 22, when Rei pulls the lance out again and uses it against Arael. Then as soon as the lance is out Lilith regrows her lower half, so far so good. Now given the the fact that Lilith is still capable of self regeneration it stands to argue that before she was harpooned by rein in EP 14 she most likely must have been complete. So the obvious question is what happened to her lower half after EP 14, based on the time-line from ( thread/17652/NGE-Timeline-the-Year-of-EVA-rewatch/ ) they head only 4 days to remove it. But more interesting is for what purpose and what did they do with it. But on the other hand based on this ( http://evangelion.wikia.com/wiki/File:Unit_01_Birth.png ) image supposed to be some ware in et 23 (even though in my DC version its missing, as apparently it was removed from the reneval release) its clear that in the past Lilith's lower half was removed at least once before. So if that was the case and Lilith as expected based on EP 22 regrew it it head one prior to ET 14 hence the question is what have been done with it?

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:00 pm I'm 90% sure it's because they used the mass from the legs before hand to rebuild/repair the Evas, most notably Unit-00. There might have been another reason took, but I'm not so sure.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:11 pm Well but if unit 00 was made from adam and not from lilith wouldn't that than be incompatible, a.k.a. tissue rejection etc.... all this problems you get when repairing humans with parts that did not belong to their twins ?

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:14 pm Lilith's lower half was removed when Unit 01 was created. She did not regenerate at that time; it is not clear why. When Rei impales her she was as we later see her, and only regenerated once the Lance was removed.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:18 pm Bagheera wrote: Lilith's lower half was removed when Unit 01 was created. She did not regenerate at that time; it is not clear why. When Rei impales her she was as we later see her, and only regenerated once the Lance was removed.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:24 pm Yea Bags has it, I knew it had something to do with building and the Evas. As for why Lilith doesn't regenerate... I would say maybe the lance gives her the energy to do so once put in and taken back out. But I don't think there is any real reason why it happens that way. And yes to the previous question you asked, it would be incompatible.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:27 pm mmh... if a lance is a device to immobilize/deactivate/etc... an "seed" why would it give energy to it while doing so. That is totally contradictory IMHO

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:57 pm After you say that you're right, it is contradictory, and your point makes a lot of sense. Like the un-consitancy of the dates in Eva, this might have been a oversight. I mean in Rebuild we already find the spear in Lilith and the legs are grown IIRC, so back when they were making NGE it might have been a "whatever" situation... so there may not be a real reason why.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:26 pm They didn't have nearly as much time to throw together the details of the show as it was being made week by week as we have had to analyse it over the past twenty years. Of course there are inconsistencies and loose ends, and maybe even outright self-contradictions. Many of them don't actually matter to the story at all.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:37 pm Here's a theory. Lilith's lower half would've grown back but only gradually, and the lance simply halted the process. Once it was removed, the lower half grew back much more quickly to save lost time

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:42 pm It's likely that Lilith was functionally inert when she was discovered, having had nothing to do with herself for the past four billion years. Chopping her in half thus wouldn't trigger any life functions because, well, inert. By impaling her with the Lance Nerv disrupted her AT Field, and when the Lance was removed her AT Field reasserted itself. Her body thus regenerated because that's the form her AT Field "knows". In short: impaling her with the Lance didn't do much, but removing it effectively jumpstarted her life functions.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:44 pm That leaves the question, why was she impaled to begin with?

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:54 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: That leaves the question, why was she impaled to begin with?

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Dec 31, 2015 5:22 pm ^Unit 01's birth also caused one of her arms to shrivel up, and the Eva wasn't quite half formed at that stage. Perhaps the birth used up even more of her body and she's spent the last 15 years regenerating? Adam didn't seem like it was in a big hurry to regenerate itself either.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 31, 2015 5:51 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: ^Unit 01's birth also caused one of her arms to shrivel up, and the Eva wasn't quite half formed at that stage. Perhaps the birth used up even more of her body and she's spent the last 15 years regenerating? Adam didn't seem like it was in a big hurry to regenerate itself either.

[]: Re: Lilith and the lance of longinus, questions...             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 04, 2016 3:50 am BlueBasilisk wrote: ^Unit 01's birth also caused one of her arms to shrivel up
